# UC-23.7.6 · Knowledge Base Deflection and Self-Service ROI

## Description

Correlates `snow:kb_search` zero-hit share and click-through yield with `snow:kb_use` plus `access_combined` article-view sessions, then joins daily `snow:incident` intake keyed off `opened_at` buckets so Splunk emits `zero_rate_pct`, `click_success_pct`, `tickets_per_kb_session`, and an implicit deflection proxy finance can multiply against `weighted_avg_contact_cost`—surfacing recurring zero-hit query stems (`search_query` aggregates) alongside CFO-ready ROI telemetry rather than vanity page-hit totals alone.

## Value

CFO and CX leadership defend **`cost-per-deflection-saved`** narratives tied to hiring freezes, offshore vendor carve-outs, and knowledge-program budgets—especially when benchmarks (**Forrester 2024**, **Gartner 2024**, **Aberdeen 2024**) expect **25–55%** mature ticket-deflection bands while **Help Scout 2024** evidence ties low-helpfulness articles to multiplied follow-on tickets; Splunk turns **`snow:kb_*`** telemetry plus **`snow:incident`** economics into weekly proof that rewriting taxonomy beats expanding voice queues.

## Implementation

(1) Extend **`Splunk_TA_snow`** inputs beyond **`incident`** to **`kb_use`**/**`kb_knowledge`** (Table API **`/api/now/table/{table}`**) or ingest Scripted REST **`snow:kb_search`** via **HEC**; (2) land **`access_combined`** Help Center **`uri`** feeds into **`index=web`** with **`status`** and **`uri`** extraction; (3) publish **`kb_article_taxonomy.csv`** plus **`weighted_avg_contact_cost.csv`** lookups on Search Heads; (4) schedule **`cx_kb_deflection_roi_daily`** weekly leadership packs with **`portal_brand`** throttles; (5) route **`zero_rate_pct`** regressions to **`#cx-analytics`** and FP&A when **`implicit`** ROI swings staffing assumptions.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or Splunk Cloud; analyst roles exposing `business` for ServiceNow KM telemetry, `web` for `access_combined` portal captures, and `business`/`itsm` for `snow:incident` snapshots delivered through `Splunk_TA_snow` (**Splunkbase 1928**).
• ServiceNow **Knowledge Management** with REST `/api/now/table/kb_knowledge`, `/api/now/table/kb_use`, optional `kb_view_count` extracts— `OAuth 2.0` grants (`client_credentials` or `password`) scoped per ServiceNow administrator guidance; rotate secrets via vault—not plaintext `local/` copies alone.
• Supplementary SaaS collectors (**Zendesk Guide** `/api/v2/help_center/articles.json`, **Salesforce** `KnowledgeArticleVersion` via Bulk API into `salesforce:knowledge_article`) when omnichannel KM spans CRM—pairs with staffing KPIs from sibling **UC-23.7.1**.
• Splunk **HTTP Event Collector** Heavy Forwarders accepting `snow:kb_search` JSON (`search_session_id`, `search_query`, `search_results_count`, `result_clicked`) emitted by Scripted REST or IntegrationHub flows—tokens isolated per environment.
• Behavioral expectation anchors (**Tethr 2024 Customer Service Insights**: shoppers who cannot locate KB guidance inside roughly **two minutes** often escalate—pair `median(time_search_to_click)` telemetry when Scripted REST exposes timestamps beside headline rates.
• Legal reviews GDPR/CCPA RTBF deletes carefully—scrubbing `caller_id` salts invalidates longitudinal `search_then_ticket` cohort slices until hashes regenerate; freeze KPI decks until Privacy confirms parity.
• RACI clarity keeps Splunk roles split (`cx_kb_editor` dashboards read-only versus `cx_kb_admin` alert editors) so taxonomy interns cannot silence zero-hit watchers owned by CX ops leadership.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**

Enable `Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow` modular `servicenow_record_input` rows for `kb_use` (article reads → `snow:kb_use`), `kb_knowledge` metadata (`snow:kb_knowledge`), `kb_feedback` thumbs (`snow:kb_feedback`) alongside existing `incident` polls—reuse `sys_updated_on` checkpoints identical to breach-tracking sibling feeds.

Stand up Scripted REST or Flow Designer payloads landing `snow:kb_search` lines whenever `Knowledge Demand Insights` or `GlideAggregate` exposes `zero-result` aggregates—each POST must preserve `search_session_id` plus `clicked_article_sys_id` when `Knowledge AI Search` surfaces snippets.

Mirror portal `access_combined` streams (**Apache**/CDN forwarders) tagging `uri` paths `*/kb/*`, `*/help/*`, `sp?id=kb` so `dwell_time_sec`/`scroll_depth_pct` arrive via parallel `hec:portal_analytics` only when Privacy approves richer behavioral telemetry.

Warehouse auditors may prefer **Splunk DB Connect** (**Splunkbase 2686**) nightly `FACT_KB_ANALYTICS` grains (`dbx:kb_daily_rollups`) reconciled weekly against Splunk-native feeds—document freshness lag (**8–24 h**) beside CFO narratives.

Publish `lookup kb_article_taxonomy.csv` bridging `article_sys_id` to `product_line`/`launch_wave` before reorganizations scramble naive `short_description` joins.

**Step 2 — Create the search and alert**

Paste the SPL saved as `cx_kb_deflection_roi_daily` scheduled `0 7 * * *` with `earliest=-30d@d` so Monday CX rituals ingest trailing-month posture identical to benchmark citations (**Forrester 2024 Customer Service Benchmark**, **Gartner 2024 Customer Service KPI**, **Zendesk CX Trends 2024**, **Help Scout Customer Service Industry Report 2024**).

Derivative monitors:
• `kb_article_leaderboard` swaps grouping `by article_sys_id` computing `views * helpful_pct - ticket_follow_rate` once `snow:kb_feedback` exposes `vote_ratio` fields aligned with **MindTouch**/**Document360** editorial rubrics when federated.

• `zero_result_terms` filters `zero_hit=1` rows on `snow:kb_search`, aggregates recurring `search_query` stems feeding backlog grooming (**Algolia DocSearch**, **Coveo Relevance Cloud**, **Lucidworks Fusion** synonyms tracked externally).

Alerts trigger when `click_success_pct` drops **12** points rolling fourteen-day versus trailing ninety-day `by portal_brand`, throttled `12h`—route `#cx-analytics` plus FP&A secondary mailbox when `implicit` ROI drafts swing hiring assumptions.

**Step 3 — Validate**

Cross-check Splunk `snow:kb_use` daily `article_views` versus ServiceNow `Knowledge → Usage` dashboards— `article_sys_id` slices must agree within **±8%**; larger drift implies duplicate HEC shipments or `dedup` omissions.

Contrast `zero_rate_pct` against **Knowledge Demand Insights** widgets—Splunk counts discrete telemetry rows whereas SN UI dedupes sessions differently; reconcile methodology notes quarterly.

Privacy-approved `caller_key` hashing must align across `snow:kb_use` JSON and `snow:incident` `caller_id`—run `transaction` spans capped **86400** seconds separating browse → `opened_at` events labeled `search_then_ticket` failure paths only when hashes match.

Finance `weighted_avg_contact_cost` (**voice USD 15–50**, **chat USD 4–10**, **self-service USD 1–3** ranges cited by **Aberdeen 2024 Self-Service ROI Study**) belongs in CFO appendix—not hard-coded SPL constants.

Strip static asset `uri` noise (`.png`, `.css`) via `where NOT match(uri,"(?i)\.(png|jpg|gif|css|js)$")` before trusting `kb_or_web_views`.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**

Dashboard Studio (**“KM ROI — deflection versus incidents”**) stacks `splunk.singlevalue` tiles for `zero_rate_pct`, `click_success_pct`, and `tickets_per_kb_session` tinted versus **Gartner** quartile narratives (**median ticket-deflection-rate ~25–35%**, **top quartile 45–55%**, citations retained verbatim).

Row-two `splunk.heatmap` plots `portal_brand` × `week` with `implicit_deflection_proxy` deltas derived offline (**explicit `case_resolved_via_kb`** flags blended with conversational `Ada`/`Forethought Solve` containment CSV drops).

Row-three `splunk.line` dual-axis overlays `kb_or_web_views` vs `incidents_opened` clarifies launch spikes (**product_calendar.csv** overlays).

Hyperlink drilldown templates hit `https://<instance>.service-now.com/nav_to.do?uri=kb_knowledge.do?sys_id=$article_sys_id$` plus Salesforce `Lightning Knowledge` consoles when hybrid stacks persist.

Executive ROI workbook computes `approx_contact_cost_saved = blended_deflection_estimate * weighted_avg_contact_cost` minus `writer_hours * blended_hourly_rate`—Splunk surfaces numerator storytelling while FP&A owns denominator sourcing because **top-decile articles deliver most measurable value**.

Monthly taxonomy councils review `zero_result_query_terms` aggregates paired with `Intercom Articles`/`Freshdesk` backlog inserts—tie `Forethought Solve` transcript misses into editorial kanban.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**

1) **Marketing amplification without backlog relief** — Awareness pushes inflate **`article_views`** before **`incidents_opened`** falls— **`utm_campaign`** filters isolate hype cycles.

2) **Ranking-only uplift** — Synonym edits shrink **`zero_rate_pct`** absent **`published`** churn—compare **`snow:kb_knowledge`** revision timestamps nightly.

3) **Mobile abandonment skew** — Smartphone seekers abandon sooner— **`device_class`** facets isolate handset mixes before blaming writers.

4) **Employee rehearsal inflation** — Staff drills spike **`distinct_search_sessions`**— **`INTERNAL_COHORT`** lookups suppress SSO cohort noise.

5) **Bot-plus-KM duplicate credits** — **`Intercom Resolution Bot`** closures overlapping **`case_resolved_via_kb`** toggles duplicate **`explicit`** counts— **`conversation_id`** collapse mandatory.

6) **Warm-transfer double postings** — Bots resolving yet supervisors reopen **`INC`** rows duplicate outcomes until transcripts classify **`resolution_owner`**.

7) **Multi-modal journeys stacking** — FAQ browse plus **`Ada`** chat plus **`INC`** triple-touch journeys require fractional attribution via **`journey_hash`** collisions resolved upstream.

8) **Iframe embed blindness** — **`Syndicated`** widgets lacking ticketing **`session_bridge`** orphan downstream **`INC`** correlation—enforce Beacon **`analytics_session`** tokens.

9) **Search-cluster synonym shocks** — Overnight synonym pushes reorder snippets sans editorial edits—CTR leaps flagged **`search_engine_build`** metadata.

10) **Sandbox bleed-through** — **`DEV`** KM telemetry hitting prod Splunk indexes inflates KPI numerators—split dashboards by **`instance`** plus **`tenant`** dimensions.

11) **Stale KM OAuth versus incident OAuth** — KM poll checkpoints stall independently—monitor **`snow:kb_search`** `_indextime` lag separately from **`snow:incident`**.

12) **Caller-hash mismatches** — Salting divergence breaks **`transaction`** joins— **`HASH_RING`** parity validation nightly between HEC transformers.

13) **Synthetic monitoring pollution** — **`curl`** probes registering **`access_combined`** **`200`** hits— **`User-Agent`** deny lists scrub **`Pingdom`**/**`Catchpoint`** signatures.

14) **Holiday trough distortions** — Ticket denominators crater during closures exaggerating implied deflection— **`business_calendar`** overlays damp denominators.

## SPL

```spl
(index=business (sourcetype="snow:kb_search" OR sourcetype="snow:kb_use")) OR (index=web sourcetype="access_combined" status<400 (uri="*/kb/*" OR uri="*/help/*" OR uri="*kb_article*" OR uri="*sp?id=kb*"))
| eval day=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval sess=coalesce(search_session_id, session_id, clientip."_".coalesce(useragent,cs_User_Agent,"ua"))
| eval res_ct=tonumber(coalesce(search_results_count,number_of_results,num_results,"0"))
| eval zero_hit=if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_search" AND (isnull(res_ct) OR res_ct<1),1,0)
| eval clicked=tonumber(coalesce(result_clicked,article_clicked,click_through,"0"))
| stats dc(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_search",sess,null))) as distinct_search_sessions,
        sum(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_search",zero_hit,0))) as zero_result_hits,
        count(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_search",1,null))) as search_rows,
        sum(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_search" AND res_ct>0 AND clicked==0,1,0))) as searches_no_click_after_hit,
        dc(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_use" OR sourcetype=="access_combined",sess,null))) as kb_or_web_sessions,
        count(eval(if(sourcetype=="snow:kb_use" OR sourcetype=="access_combined",1,null))) as kb_or_web_views
    by day
| eval zero_rate_pct=round(100*zero_result_hits/nullif(search_rows,0),2)
| eval click_success_pct=if(search_rows>0, round(100*(search_rows-searches_no_click_after_hit)/nullif(search_rows,0),2), null())
| join type=left max=0 day [
    search index=business sourcetype="snow:incident" earliest=-90d@d
    | eval opened_epoch=strptime(opened_at, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    | where isnotnull(opened_epoch)
    | eval day=strftime(opened_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d")
    | stats count as incidents_opened by day
  ]
| eval tickets_per_kb_session=round(incidents_opened/nullif(kb_or_web_sessions,0),4)
| table day distinct_search_sessions zero_rate_pct click_success_pct kb_or_web_views incidents_opened tickets_per_kb_session
```

## Visualization

(1) **`splunk.singlevalue`** trio rolling **`zero_rate_pct`**, **`click_success_pct`**, **`tickets_per_kb_session`** versus trailing-quarter bands. (2) **`splunk.line`** dual-axis **`kb_or_web_views`** vs **`incidents_opened`** annotated with **`product_calendar.csv`** overlays. (3) **`splunk.heatmap`** **`portal_brand`** × **`week`** using **`implicit_deflection_proxy`** offline joins. (4) **`splunk.column`** pairing **`distinct_search_sessions`** against **`incidents_opened`** per day for pacing reads versus backlog intake. (5) **`splunk.table`** drilldown **`article_sys_id`**, **`views`**, **`helpfulness_pct`**, **`ticket_follow_rate`** once leaderboard searches ship.
